## Source plugin: `empty`

Creates an unformatted empty partition. Requires `--size` or `--fixed-size` to set the partition size.

Optional `--sourceparams` to zero-fill the partition:

- `--sourceparams="fill"`: Fill the entire partition with zeros. Requires `--fixed-size`.
- `--sourceparams="size=<N>[S|K|M|G]"`: Zero the first N bytes of the partition.

Common usage:

```
part foo --source empty --ondisk sda --size=1024 --align 1024
```
